name: linkedin
description: Browserless LinkedIn public job and company reads, normal website-session login, typed member-website write actions (connect, message, post, comment, react, follow), and a bounded interface to approved official LinkedIn APIs.

auth.api_setup_scope: only the LinkedIn products and scopes approved for the user's OAuth application

runtime.auth_interaction: one normal LinkedIn login when an account operation first needs it; an approved OAuth token remains optional

typed_fast_paths: retained normal LinkedIn website login with direct Voyager account verification
approved official LinkedIn API reads and writes
coverage.website_parity: Public jobs and company pages work without setup. `agentweb connect linkedin` now captures and directly verifies a normal LinkedIn member session, so agents do not need a developer app merely to log in. Typed member-website write actions (connect, message, post, comment, react, follow) ride that session but are shipped UNVERIFIED: their Voyager request contracts are reverse-engineered from the LinkedIn web client and have no semantic receipt. Approved official API products remain optional. Full typed member-website parity is not yet claimed.
not_mapped: Recruiter, Sales Navigator, Campaign Manager, and other separately licensed products
human_boundaries: one-time website login and any LinkedIn security checkpoint
optional OAuth consent and product approval
password, passkey, OTP, CAPTCHA, legal consent, and payment confirmation
constraints: LinkedIn may rate-limit or withdraw its guest page endpoints
official API operations only work when LinkedIn has approved the required product and scopes
member-website write contracts are reverse-engineered and unverified; LinkedIn may change them without notice
AgentWeb does not attempt to bypass LinkedIn anti-automation controls

jobs_search.description: Search LinkedIn's public job listings without signing in.
jobs_search.when_to_use: Use this to search public LinkedIn job listings without signing in.
jobs_search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read one listing's full detail; call job_get.

errors.message: LinkedIn limited public access to this resource and requires a signed-in session.
errors.user_action: Run agentweb connect linkedin (or configure_token) and retry.

errors.message: LinkedIn returned an unexpected HTTP error for this request.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry; if it persists, verify the inputs and session.

errors.message: One or more arguments were empty or outside their allowed range.
errors.user_action: Fix the reported field against the input schema and call again.

job_get.description: Read one public LinkedIn job listing by numeric job ID.
job_get.when_to_use: Use this to read one public job listing by numeric job ID.
job_get.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to search listings; call jobs_search.

errors.message: LinkedIn has no public job listing with that numeric ID.
errors.user_action: Confirm the job ID with jobs_search, then retry.

errors.user_action: Fix the reported field against the input schema and call again.

company_get.description: Read the public summary metadata for a LinkedIn company page.
company_get.when_to_use: Use this to read a company page's public summary metadata by slug.
company_get.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for member profiles or posts; those are not mapped.

slug.description: Company page slug from its public URL

errors.message: LinkedIn has no public company page with that slug.
errors.user_action: Confirm the company slug from its public page URL, then retry.

configure_token.description: Validate and securely retain an approved LinkedIn OAuth access token for this AgentWeb profile.
configure_token.when_to_use: Use this once to validate and retain an approved LinkedIn OAuth access token for this profile.
configure_token.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to authenticate the website session; that uses agentweb connect linkedin.

errors.message: LinkedIn rejected the provided OAuth access token.
errors.user_action: Provide a valid, approved, unexpired token and retry.

errors.message: LinkedIn returned an unexpected HTTP error for this request.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry; if it persists, verify the inputs and session.

auth_status.description: Verify the normal LinkedIn website session and show whether an optional official API token is also available.
auth_status.when_to_use: Use this to verify the website session and whether an optional official API token is also present.
auth_status.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to directly probe the member session; call account_status.

errors.message: LinkedIn returned an unexpected HTTP error for this request.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry; if it persists, verify the inputs and session.

account_status.description: Directly verify the retained normal LinkedIn login through LinkedIn's member session endpoint.
account_status.when_to_use: Use this to directly verify the retained login through LinkedIn's member session endpoint.
account_status.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to check API-token presence; call auth_status.

errors.message: LinkedIn returned an unexpected HTTP error for this request.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry; if it persists, verify the inputs and session.

disconnect.description: Delete the retained LinkedIn website session and optional saved OAuth token. Environment variables are not changed.
disconnect.when_to_use: Use this to delete the retained website session and any saved OAuth token; env vars are unchanged.
disconnect.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to only remove the OAuth token; this clears the website session too.

confirm.description: Must be true to delete the session and token

errors.message: This operation changes remote state and requires confirm=true.
errors.user_action: Inspect the inputs and repeat the call with confirm set to true.

api_request.description: Call one approved official LinkedIn /v2 or /rest API endpoint. Writes require confirm=true.
api_request.when_to_use: Use this to call one approved official /v2 or /rest endpoint; writes require confirm=true.
api_request.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for public reads that have a typed command; call jobs_search, job_get, or company_get.

path.description: Approved LinkedIn API path such as /v2/userinfo

method.description: HTTP method; GET and HEAD are read-only

body.description: JSON request body for write methods

linkedin_version.description: Optional LinkedIn-Version header value for versioned /rest endpoints

confirm.description: Required for any state-changing HTTP method

max_items.description: Maximum list items retained in the response

max_string.description: Maximum characters kept per string value

max_total_chars.description: Hard ceiling for the complete nested JSON response

send_invitation.description: Send a LinkedIn connection request to a member, with an optional note. UNVERIFIED: rides the reverse-engineered Voyager web session.
send_invitation.when_to_use: Use this to send a connection request to a member you have their profile URN for.
send_invitation.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to message an existing connection; call send_message.

message.description: Optional custom note (LinkedIn caps this at 300 characters)

confirm.description: Must be true to send the invitation

send_message.when_to_use: Use this to message a member by their member id or profile URN.
send_message.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to send a connection request; call send_invitation.

confirm.description: Must be true to send the message
